name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x v0.25: All 56 creature sprites are now actually cinderized in the game assets, not just in the plugin dir. cinderize-creatures.py was previously only writing to plugins/cinder-creatures/sprites/ so the starter project's assets/ and the top-level assets/sprites/cinder_NN.png were still loading raw 169-color CC0 originals. v0.25 syncs the GB-DMG-quantized + 1px outlined + per-type-marked versions to all four target dirs every run — the bestiary now reads as one Cinder set in-game (DATA dots, LOGIC bracket, MEM 2x2 block, PROC arrow tail, CORE diagonal). Carries forward v0.24's ember-trade gym leaders (AUDITOR PYRE / KEEPER KILN / FOREMAN HUSKE / CARRIER WICK / STOKER HEARTH), v0.21's branded title + player-name entry, v0.20's Achievements page, v0.19's Codex tab, v0.18's VOID final fight, v0.17 CORE / v0.16 DATA / v0.15 PROC / v0.14 MEM / v0.12 LOGIC gyms, v0.13's catch loop, v0.11's USB-driven encounter pool, 5-type chart. Adventure Plus + Advanced Dialogue 2 + Advanced Menu 2 plugins also installed in this build.
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
